headline: HONEYWELL MODULAR TECHNOLOGY TO POWER AND AUTOMATE ACELEN RENEWABLES BIOFUEL PRODUCTION
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that its modular Ecofining™ process technology, specialized pumps, compressors, and integrated control and safety systems will help drive sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and renewable diesel production for Acelen Renewables' greenfield site in Bahia, Brazil.
